correct_copy: DE N4CCB N4CCB AR K N4CCB DE OM0ET AR KN OM0ET DE N4CCB GM OM ES TNX FER CALL UR RST
notes: Loopback capture of YouTube QSO (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=02Y2y3X03mw). N4CCB calls and works OM0ET. Second station (OM0ET) comes back on a slightly different tone, which exposed a streaming-decoder lock failure: pitch tracker held the first station's tone, stopped emitting characters during the OM0ET segment, and was slow to resume on N4CCB's reply. Captured 2026-04-24 ~13:06 local. 48 kHz mono 16-bit, ~106.75 s.
